CustomField.description: FRA statutory page limit for this document type: EA = 75, Draft EIS = 150, Final EIS = 300. Set by a before-save flow based on nepa_document_type__c. Null for document types with no statutory limit (CE documents, appendices, supporting analysis). Stored here to enable report formula comparisons without a CMT lookup.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: FRA statutory page limit: EA = 75, Draft EIS = 150, Final EIS = 300. Null for exempt types.
CustomField.label: FRA Page Limit
